tools.description: Returns a variety of information about the Spaces specified by the requested IDs

tools.description: Retrieves Tweets shared in the specified Space.

tools.name: tweets.addOrDeleteRules
tools.description: Add or delete rules from a User's active rule set. Users can provide unique, optionally tagged rules to add. Users can delete their entire rule set or a subset specified by rule ids or values.

tools.name: tweets.createTweet
tools.description: Causes the User to create a Tweet under the authorized account.

tools.name: tweets.deleteTweetById
tools.description: Delete specified Tweet (in the path) by ID.

tools.name: tweets.findTweetById
tools.description: Returns a variety of information about the Tweet specified by the requested ID.

tools.name: tweets.findTweetsById
tools.description: Returns a variety of information about the Tweet specified by the requested ID.

tools.name: tweets.findTweetsThatQuoteATweet
tools.description: Returns a variety of information about each Tweet that quotes the Tweet specified by the requested ID.

tools.name: tweets.getRules
tools.description: Returns rules from a User's active rule set. Users can fetch all of their rules or a subset, specified by the provided rule ids.

tools.name: tweets.getTweetsFirehoseStream
tools.description: Streams 100% of public Tweets.

tools.description: Streams a deterministic 10% of public Tweets.

tools.name: tweets.searchStream

tools.name: tweets.tweetsRecentSearch
tools.description: Returns Tweets from the last 7 days that match a search query.

tools.name: tweets.usersIdLike
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to like the specified Tweet. The User in the path must match the User context authorizing the request.

tools.name: tweets.usersIdLikedTweets
tools.description: Returns a list of Tweets liked by the provided User ID

tools.description: Returns Tweet objects that mention username associated to the provided User ID

tools.name: tweets.usersIdRetweets
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to retweet the specified Tweet. The User in the path must match the User context authorizing the request.

tools.name: tweets.usersIdTimeline
tools.description: Returns Tweet objects that appears in the provided User ID's home timeline

tools.name: tweets.usersIdTweets
tools.description: Returns a list of Tweets authored by the provided User ID

tools.name: tweets.usersIdUnlike
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to unlike the specified Tweet. The User must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: tweets.usersIdUnretweets
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to unretweet the specified Tweet. The User must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: users.findMyUser
tools.description: This endpoint returns information about the requesting User.

tools.description: This endpoint returns information about a User. Specify User by ID.

tools.description: This endpoint returns information about a User. Specify User by username.

tools.description: This endpoint returns information about Users. Specify Users by their ID.

tools.description: Returns a list of Users that follow a List by the provided List ID

tools.name: users.listGetMembers
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that are members of a List by the provided List ID.

tools.name: users.tweetsIdLikingUsers
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that have liked the provided Tweet ID

tools.name: users.tweetsIdRetweetingUsers
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that have retweeted the provided Tweet ID

tools.name: users.usersIdBlock
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to block the target User. The User (in the path) must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: users.usersIdBlocking
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that are blocked by the provided User ID

tools.name: users.usersIdFollow
tools.description: Causes the User(in the path) to follow, or “request to follow” for protected Users, the target User. The User(in the path) must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: users.usersIdFollowers
tools.description: Returns a list of Users who are followers of the specified User ID.

tools.name: users.usersIdFollowing
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that are being followed by the provided User ID

tools.name: users.usersIdMute
tools.description: Causes the User (in the path) to mute the target User. The User (in the path) must match the User context authorizing the request.

tools.name: users.usersIdMuting
tools.description: Returns a list of Users that are muted by the provided User ID

tools.name: users.usersIdUnblock
tools.description: Causes the source User to unblock the target User. The source User must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: users.usersIdUnfollow
tools.description: Causes the source User to unfollow the target User. The source User must match the User context authorizing the request

tools.name: users.usersIdUnmute
tools.description: Causes the source User to unmute the target User. The source User must match the User context authorizing the request
